title: elsota hostmannii
intro: Elsota hostmannii, also known as the Wild Bergamot, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mint family. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Elsota hostmannii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Elsota hostmannii can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
